ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the evaluation */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area Under the Curve (AUC) score */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1measure" REAL /* F1 Measure of the model */,
  "gmean" REAL /* Geometric Mean of the model */,
  "recall20" REAL /* Recall at 20 */,
  "mcc" REAL /* Matthews Correlation Coefficient (MCC) */,
  "fp" INTEGER /* Number of false positives */,
  "fn" INTEGER /* Number of false negatives */,
  "waste_effort" INTEGER /* Amount of waste effort recorded */,
  "all_effort" INTEGER /* Total effort expended */,
  "time_auc" REAL /* Time taken to compute AUC */,
  "time_f1measure" REAL /* Time taken to compute F1 Measure */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the evaluation */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the evaluation */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the evaluation was conducted (e.g., development, production) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for the model during evaluation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model and its purpose */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used to train the model */,
  "training_duration" REAL /* Duration it took to train the model */,
  "model_size" REAL /* Size of the model in bytes */,
  "training_data_version" TEXT /* Version of the training data used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., CSV file, database) */,
  "input_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the dataset inputs */,
  "target_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the dataset target outputs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the dataset */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "data_quality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data quality metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being logged */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation started */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the evaluation failed */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_logs_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "efforts" (
  "effort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effort record */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation associated with the effort */,
  "effort_type" TEXT /* Type of effort recorded (e.g., training, validation) */,
  "effort_value" REAL /* Value of the effort (e.g., time in hours) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the effort was recorded */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the effort */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the effort */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the effort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_efforts_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_efforts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_efforts_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., read, write) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user-role association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user-role association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being assessed */,
  "completeness" REAL /* Completeness metric of the dataset */,
  "validity" REAL /* Validity metric of the dataset */,
  "consistency" REAL /* Consistency metric of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the quality record was created */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset quality metrics */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the quality record */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the quality record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
